auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.passwordHint: Must be at least 8 characters long
auth.captchaRequired: Please complete the captcha to continue.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.twoFactorDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.
auth.forgotDescription: Send a reset link to your email — or look up the account by company workspace.
auth.forgotByEmailHint: We'll email a reset link if an account exists for this address.
auth.forgotBySlugHint: Enter your company workspace slug (the part after the URL prefix).
auth.forgotSlugNoMatch: No accounts surface for this workspace.
auth.forgotSlugPickHint: Pick the address that's yours — we'll email a reset link to the real address (not the masked one).
auth.forgotEmailSentDesc: If an account exists, a reset link is on its way. The link expires in 1 hour.
auth.forgotError: Couldn't process the request. Please try again.
auth.resetDescription: Set the new password you'd like to use from now on.
auth.resetTokenMissing: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.resetDoneDesc: Sign in with your new password.
auth.resetError: Couldn't update password — the link may have expired.
auth.signupVerificationSent: Account ready — check your inbox to verify your email.
auth.passwordlessDescription: Get a one-tap link in your inbox or punch in a 6-digit code.
auth.linkHint: We'll email a single-use link that signs you in immediately.
auth.linkSentDesc: Click the link in your inbox within 5 minutes — it works once.
auth.otpHint: We'll email a 6-digit code valid for 5 minutes.
auth.loginUnverifiedNotice: Verify your email first — we just resent the link.
auth.verifyEmailSuccessDesc: Signing you in and redirecting to your dashboard…
auth.verifyEmailExpiredDesc: It may have expired (1 hour) or already been used. Send a fresh one.
auth.verifyEmailMissingDesc: Open the link from your verification email — it includes the token.
auth.verifyPendingDesc: We sent a verification link. Click it to finish signing in.
auth.verifyPendingDescWithEmail: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to finish signing in.
auth.invitesSignInRequired: Sign in or create an account to accept this invitation.
auth.invitesWrongAccountDesc: This invitation is for {target} but you're signed in as {current}.
auth.passkeyDescription: Sign in with TouchID, Face ID, Windows Hello, or a security key.
auth.passkeyEmpty: No passkeys yet — add one to enable one-tap sign-in.
auth.passkeyAddDescription: Pick a label, then approve the prompt with your device authenticator.
auth.passkeyRemoveConfirmDesc: {name} will no longer be able to sign you in.
auth.passkeysCardDescription: Manage the passkeys (TouchID, security keys, etc.) that can sign you in.
